concurrent.interpreters/Queue.name: Queue
concurrent.interpreters/Queue.description: A wrapper around a low-level, cross-interpreter queue, which implements the queue.Queue interface. The underlying queue can only be created through create_queue(). Some objects are actually shared and some are copied efficiently, but most are copied via pickle. See “Sharing” Objects. id¶ (read-only) The queue’s ID.

info.excerpt: A wrapper around a low-level, cross-interpreter queue, which implements the queue.Queue interface. The underlying queue can only be created through create_queue(). Some objects are actually shared and...

concurrent.interpreters/QueueEmptyError.name: QueueEmptyError
concurrent.interpreters/QueueEmptyError.description: This exception, a subclass of queue.Empty, is raised from Queue.get() and Queue.get_nowait() when the queue is empty.

info.excerpt: This exception, a subclass of queue.Empty, is raised from Queue.get() and Queue.get_nowait() when the queue is empty.

concurrent.interpreters/QueueFullError.name: QueueFullError
concurrent.interpreters/QueueFullError.description: This exception, a subclass of queue.Full, is raised from Queue.put() and Queue.put_nowait() when the queue is full.

info.excerpt: This exception, a subclass of queue.Full, is raised from Queue.put() and Queue.put_nowait() when the queue is full.
